garantiaDefault: Personalised assessment with no commitment. If after the first session we consider it's not the right treatment for you, we'll guide you to the most effective alternative for your case.

categorias.descripcion: Facial care at different levels of depth and sophistication.
Peels, mesotherapy, dermapen and regeneration technology.
Non-surgical firming with Ultherapy HIFU and INDIBA radiofrequency.
Botox, hyaluronic acid, thread lifts and PRP.
Wood therapy, pressotherapy, drainage and muscle recovery.
Relaxing, therapeutic, facial and specialist massages.
Individual lash extensions and semi-permanent pigmentation.
Intense pulsed light, safe and comfortable for all skin types.

tratamientos.descripcion: An essential, gentle and effective treatment — ideal for keeping skin clean, balanced and healthy without aggressive procedures.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those looking for basic but effective maintenance and who want to prevent blemishes before they appear.
comoFunciona: Deep facial cleanse adapted to your skin type: cleansing, gentle exfoliation and toning.
Careful extraction of comedones and blackheads to unclog pores.
Removal of dead skin cells to promote natural cell renewal.
beneficios: Deep facial cleanse adapted to all skin types
Careful extraction of comedones and impurities
Visible improvement in texture and appearance
Prevents clogged pores and future blemishes
Leaves skin fresh, smooth and even-toned
tratamientos.idealPara: Regular maintenance or as a first step before more advanced treatments.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Repeat every 4–6 weeks to keep skin clean and balanced.

tratamientos.descripcion: An advanced treatment combining deep cleansing with powerful hydration to restore radiance, freshness and vitality to your skin.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For dehydrated or dull skin that needs to regain radiance without invasive procedures.
comoFunciona: Deep facial cleanse removes impurities, excess oil and accumulated residues.
Gentle exfoliation to promote cell renewal and improve texture.
Intensive hydration with hyaluronic acid for a plumping effect and moisture retention.
Antioxidant vitamin C to brighten and combat signs of fatigue.
beneficios: Gentle exfoliation that renews the skin
Improved elasticity, smoothness and even tone
Final face cream to lock in hydration
tratamientos.idealPara: Dehydrated, dull or lacklustre skin seeking a rejuvenating effect without invasive procedures.

tratamientos.descripcion: Detox cleanse + nano-needle peel. Innovative — purifies and revitalises skin from within.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For congested, dull or blemish-prone skin that needs a deep reset.
comoFunciona: Deep facial cleanse removes toxins, impurities and excess oil.
Nano-needle peel stimulates cell renewal without damaging the skin.
Detoxifying mask purifies, soothes and balances the skin.
The combination improves active absorption and enhances subsequent results.
beneficios: Brighter, fresher skin from the first session
tratamientos.idealPara: Dull, congested, blemish-prone or devitalised skin.

tratamientos.descripcion: A complete treatment to achieve clean, hydrated and radiant skin.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those seeking complete care combining deep cleansing, device-assisted hydration and intensive exfoliation.
comoFunciona: Preparatory deep facial cleanse.
Advanced facial device hydration to boost absorption.
Three exfoliants applied to renew skin at different levels.
Nourishing serum, personalised mask and final cream seal the treatment.
beneficios: Visible improvement in texture and radiance
Rejuvenating result from the first session
tratamientos.idealPara: Those looking for brighter, smoother and more youthful skin with a complete treatment.

tratamientos.descripcion: An exclusive treatment designed to renew, hydrate and revitalise your skin to the highest level.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those seeking the most complete in-house treatment, with gypsum therapy and premium devices.
comoFunciona: Preparatory deep facial cleanse.
Intensive hydration with advanced facial devices.
Premium exfoliants renewing the skin at different layers.
Gypsum therapy mask with a firming and revitalising effect.
Nourishing face cream and sunscreen complete the ritual.
beneficios: Radiant skin from the first session
tratamientos.idealPara: Those who want to give their skin the most exclusive care and show a radiant complexion.

tratamientos.descripcion: A non-invasive treatment designed to reduce localised fat and improve skin appearance without needles. Ampoules with caffeine and vitamins applied via virtual technology.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those with localised fat or mild sagging looking to improve skin tone without needles or downtime.
comoFunciona: Caffeine accelerates blood and lymphatic circulation, promoting mobilisation of fat stored in adipocytes.
Vitamins and nutrients nourish, revitalise and firm the skin from within.
Virtual technology ensures painless absorption of active ingredients, stimulating the natural metabolism to burn released fat.
beneficios: Safe, painless procedure with no downtime
tratamientos.idealPara: People with localised fat, mild sagging or those looking to improve skin tone and appearance without invasive procedures.

tratamientos.descripcion: An intensive treatment applying a 100% pure marine collagen veil to restore elasticity, firmness and immediate rejuvenation.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For dull, dehydrated or fatigued skin that needs an immediate boost of hydration and firmness.
comoFunciona: A 100% pure marine-origin collagen veil is applied directly to the face.
Marine collagen restores elasticity and improves firmness from the first session.
Promotes cell regeneration and protects skin against signs of fatigue and ageing.
incluye: Ideal for dull or dehydrated skin
tratamientos.idealPara: All skin types, especially dull, dehydrated or tired-looking skin.

tratamientos.descripcion: A combined treatment boosting skin regeneration and revitalisation with microneedles and deep hydration.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those wanting to firm, smooth fine lines and rejuvenate the face naturally and progressively.
comoFunciona: The Dermapen creates controlled micro-punctures in the skin.
These micro-punctures stimulate fibroblasts, responsible for producing collagen and elastin.
After a preparatory deep facial cleanse, intensive hydration with hyaluronic acid and vitamins is applied to boost radiance and elasticity.
beneficios: Firmer, smoother and more youthful skin
Reduction of fine lines and wrinkles
incluye: Intensive hydration with hyaluronic acid and vitamins
tratamientos.idealPara: Skin with fine lines, lack of firmness or need for deep regeneration.

tratamientos.descripcion: An advanced microneedling treatment that stimulates the skin's natural regeneration, restoring collagen and elastin to improve acne scarring.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those living with acne scars or superficial marks wanting to achieve a more even skin tone.
comoFunciona: The Dermapen creates controlled micro-perforations in the skin.
These micro-perforations activate the body's natural repair process.
Collagen and elastin are restored, improving existing scars and strengthening the skin structure.
beneficios: Reduction of acne scars and superficial marks
More even tone and rejuvenated appearance
tratamientos.idealPara: Skin with acne scars or superficial marks, all skin types.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Several sessions may be required depending on scar depth. Using soothing products and sun protection afterwards is essential.

tratamientos.descripcion: An advanced, non-surgical treatment to eliminate dark spots, improve texture and rejuvenate the face. Depigmenting chemical peel + radiofrequency.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For women with accumulated sun spots, hyperpigmentation or uneven tone seeking a progressive, long-lasting improvement.
comoFunciona: Depigmenting chemical peel with a combination of 4 acids, controlled removal of superficial layers.
Combined with radiofrequency to stimulate collagen production and improve skin firmness.
Programme of 4 full sessions that deeply renew skin and stimulate the dermal matrix.
beneficios: Progressive elimination of spots and blemishes
Visible reduction of wrinkles and spots
tratamientos.idealPara: Spots and uneven tone, facial wrinkles, acne scars, aged or lacking-firmness skin.

tratamientos.descripcion: Deep friction-free exfoliation using a chemical solution. Removes damaged cells and stimulates cell regeneration.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those wanting to deeply renew skin, improve tone and smooth fine lines in one session.
comoFunciona: Prior facial cleanse to prepare the skin.
Application of a chemical solution adapted to your skin type, without mechanical friction.
Soothing and protective products enhance results and protect the renewed skin.
beneficios: Smoother, more even and rejuvenated skin
tratamientos.idealPara: Skin blemishes, acne marks, expression lines, enlarged pores, dull or ageing skin.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Mild redness or flaking may appear after treatment (part of the renewal process). Use sunscreen and follow recommendations.

tratamientos.descripcion: A mechanical exfoliation technique that removes dead skin cells and fine facial hair, revealing brighter and smoother skin.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those wanting immediately brighter, soft-to-touch skin free of the fine hair that dulls the complexion.
comoFunciona: A specialist surgical scalpel glides gently over clean, dry skin.
Carefully removes superficial layers: dead cells, impurities and vellus hair (fine hair that dullens the skin).
Skin renews naturally and subsequent skincare products penetrate better, enhancing their efficacy.
beneficios: Removes dead cells and fine facial hair
Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive
incluye: Removes dead cells and facial hair
tratamientos.idealPara: All skin types, including sensitive, seeking immediate radiance without peeling.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Repeat every 4–6 weeks. Avoid direct sun exposure immediately after and apply sun protection.

tratamientos.descripcion: A specialist facial care to combat acne, calm the skin and prevent future breakouts.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For teenagers and adults with active acne, oily-prone or recurring inflammatory breakouts.
comoFunciona: Deep facial cleanse removes impurities, oil and residues accumulated in pores.
Application of specific anti-acne actives that regulate sebum and combat bacteria.
High-frequency session that reduces inflammation, speeds healing and prevents new breakouts.
beneficios: Reduces blackheads, spots and recent marks
tratamientos.idealPara: Skin with active acne, oily or inflammatory tendency.

tratamientos.descripcion: An advanced procedure for small imperfections (warts, spots, fibromas) using plasma energy — no surgery.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those with small localised imperfections (freckles, spots, warts) wanting to remove them without surgery.
comoFunciona: The laser generates a small point of energy on the skin surface, creating a controlled micro-burn.
This precise action removes the lesion without damaging surrounding tissue.
Stimulates the skin's natural regeneration and collagen production, improving quality and firmness.
beneficios: Visible results from the first sessions
tratamientos.idealPara: Freckles, spots, warts, small skin lesions and localised imperfections.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: A light temporary scab may appear after treatment (natural process). Do not touch the area and use sun protection.

tratamientos.descripcion: Focused ultrasound that firms, sculpts and rejuvenates. Stimulates natural collagen and elastin production for a non-surgical facelift.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those seeking a natural lifting effect without surgery, anaesthesia or downtime.
comoFunciona: Focused ultrasound acts on the deep layers of the skin — exactly where a surgeon cuts for a facelift.
Activates natural regeneration and stimulates collagen and elastin production from within.
Results are progressive: visible improvement from the first month, optimal result at 3–6 months, long-lasting.
beneficios: Firmer, more elastic and youthful skin
tratamientos.idealPara: People with facial or body sagging looking for a natural facelift without surgery.

tratamientos.descripcion: INDIBA technology working from within the cell to stimulate collagen and elastin. Firmer, brighter and more rejuvenated skin from the first session.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those with sagging, loss of firmness or signs of ageing on the face and body wanting visible results from the first session without invasion.
comoFunciona: INDIBA radiofrequency emits high-frequency waves acting simultaneously on the three layers of the skin.
Stimulates collagen and elastin production, firming tissue from within.
Improves circulation and eliminates toxins, resulting in brighter, firmer and healthier skin.
tratamientos.idealPara: People with sagging, loss of firmness or signs of ageing on the face and body.

tratamientos.descripcion: Botulinum toxin injection to temporarily block the muscle contractions responsible for dynamic wrinkles.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those wanting to soften forehead, frown line or crow's feet wrinkles while maintaining natural expressiveness.
comoFunciona: Precise micro-injections are applied to the muscles that create expression lines.
Botulinum toxin temporarily blocks the nerve signals that contract these muscles.
Wrinkles soften and the formation of new lines is prevented. Natural, relaxed result.
beneficios: Prevents new expression lines from forming
tratamientos.idealPara: Those looking to soften forehead, frown line or crow's feet wrinkles with a natural result.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Avoid massages, saunas or intense exercise in the first 24 hours after application.

tratamientos.descripcion: A minimally invasive treatment that remodels and rejuvenates facial and lip contours, restoring volume to areas affected by ageing.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those wanting to restore volume in specific areas (folds, lips) or redefine contours without surgery.
comoFunciona: Precise hyaluronic acid injections are applied to specific areas according to the objective.
Hyaluronic acid attracts water and integrates with tissue, filling folds or adding lip volume naturally.
A review at 15–30 days ensures the optimal result and allows adjustment if needed.
tratamientos.idealPara: Those wanting to remodel contours, soften folds or add lip volume.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Avoid intense massages, prolonged sun or saunas during the first days. Attend the review appointment.

tratamientos.descripcion: Aesthetic medicine using fine threads to rejuvenate and tighten the face naturally. Improves firmness, softens wrinkles and redefines contours.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those with moderate sagging, dropped facial oval or wanting to redefine the jawline without surgery.
comoFunciona: Threads are inserted under the skin using precise, minimally invasive techniques.
They provide an immediate lifting effect by elevating and repositioning tissue.
Stimulate natural collagen production, improving skin firmness and quality long-term.
beneficios: Lifts brows and redefines the jawline
Visible results from the first session
tratamientos.idealPara: Moderate facial sagging, dropped facial oval or those seeking a lifting effect without surgery.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Avoid intense massages and physical exertion during the first days.

tratamientos.descripcion: Biostimulation using your own plasma to rejuvenate skin naturally. Reactivates your own regenerative capacity.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those wanting a 100% natural treatment using their own plasma, ideal for skin with signs of ageing or sagging.
comoFunciona: A small blood sample is taken from the patient.
It is centrifuged to separate platelet-rich plasma, concentrating growth factors.
This concentrate is applied to the skin, stimulating cell regeneration and the production of collagen and elastin.
beneficios: Reduction of fine lines and expression lines
Natural treatment using your own plasma
incluye: Natural treatment with your own plasma
tratamientos.idealPara: Skin with signs of ageing, lack of radiance, sagging or dehydration.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Several sessions may be required depending on skin needs. Follow aftercare instructions.

tratamientos.descripcion: Aesthetic massage with wooden tools designed to stimulate circulation, tone and firm the skin. Effective for localised fat, sagging or cellulite.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those with cellulite, body sagging or localised fat seeking a manual, non-invasive and relaxing treatment.
comoFunciona: Precise movements with rollers and other wooden tools activate blood and lymphatic circulation.
Improves tissue oxygenation and stimulates collagen and elastin production.
Promotes skin firmness, elasticity and mobilisation of accumulated fat.
beneficios: Reduces localised fat and abdominal volume
tratamientos.idealPara: People with cellulite, body sagging or localised fat on abdomen, buttocks or legs.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Combine with hydration, balanced diet and exercise to enhance results.

tratamientos.descripcion: A non-invasive treatment applying sequential pressure on legs, abdomen and arms to stimulate lymphatic drainage, circulation and cell regeneration.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For people with tired legs, fluid retention, poor circulation or those who spend many hours standing or sitting.
comoFunciona: Sequential air pressures are applied to legs, abdomen, arms or other areas.
Stimulates lymphatic drainage and blood circulation, helping to eliminate retained toxins and fluids.
Promotes tissue oxygenation and skin elasticity, leaving an immediate feeling of lightness.
beneficios: Promotes elimination of fluids and toxins
tratamientos.idealPara: People looking to improve circulation, lymphatic drainage and reduce fluid retention.

tratamientos.descripcion: A specialist treatment after surgery to speed recovery, reduce inflammation and improve aesthetic results.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For patients who have recently undergone surgery (lipo, tummy tuck, breast augmentation, facelift) or people with severe oedema and retention.
comoFunciona: Gentle, slow and precise movements stimulate the lymphatic system.
Helps eliminate retained fluids, toxins and anaesthetic residues accumulated after surgery.
Promotes tissue de-inflammation, prevents fibrosis and visibly improves scarring.
tratamientos.idealPara: Post-op from liposuction, tummy tuck, breast augmentation, facelift or other aesthetic procedures. Also for fluid retention or oedema.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Begin as advised by your doctor. Drink plenty of water and follow professional guidelines for optimal recovery.

tratamientos.descripcion: A non-invasive body treatment for shoulders, back, lower back, knees or tired legs. Relaxes muscles, relieves tension and promotes recovery.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those suffering from chronic muscle pain, accumulated tension from work or overload in specific body areas.
comoFunciona: Application of combined techniques acting on tense muscles and pain points.
Improves local circulation, oxygenates tissue and relaxes contracted muscle fibres.
Progressive programme: with several sessions, relief is sustained and the area regains functionality.
beneficios: Reduces muscle pain sensation from the first sessions
Improves circulation and recovery in treated areas
tratamientos.idealPara: People with muscle discomfort, accumulated tension or overload in different body areas.

tratamientos.descripcion: A treatment on the musculoskeletal system to release tension, relax muscles and produce a sedative and revitalising effect.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those accumulating tension from work, sport or stress needing a deep disconnection of body and mind.
comoFunciona: Active and precise techniques working on muscles, tendons and joints.
Stimulate the nervous system to promote deep relaxation.
Improve blood circulation and tone muscles, leaving a revitalising sensation.
beneficios: Relaxes and tones the whole body
tratamientos.idealPara: Those looking to relieve discomfort, contractures or deeply unwind and relax.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Complement with hydration and gentle stretching after the massage.

tratamientos.descripcion: Massage with 100% natural vegetable and essential oils. Ideal for relieving stress, muscle tension and contractures.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those seeking total disconnection, stress relief and a relaxing sensory experience.
comoFunciona: Wide and precise movements on legs, arms, neck and back with natural vegetable and essential oils.
Release accumulated tension and provide a deep sense of physical and mental wellbeing.
Essential oils enhance the relaxing effect through scent and skin contact.
tratamientos.idealPara: Periodic relaxation sessions or after intense days.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Combine with hydration and deep breathing to enhance effects.

tratamientos.descripcion: Combines massage techniques on face, head, neck, trapezius and scalp with essential oils. Releases stress and improves mobility.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those suffering from tension headaches, cervical contractures or accumulated mental stress.
comoFunciona: Gentle and precise movements on face, skull, cervicals and shoulders with essential oils.
Release contractures in areas especially sensitive to stress.
Stimulate local circulation and improve mobility and tone of cervical muscles.
beneficios: Relieves tension in neck, shoulders and head
tratamientos.idealPara: Those seeking relief from tension headaches, cervical contractures or mental stress.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Avoid intense physical activity immediately after the massage to prolong its effects.

tratamientos.descripcion: A massage that revitalises and soothes the feet, improves circulation and provides wellbeing throughout the body.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those who spend many hours on their feet, athletes or people with tired or swollen feet.
comoFunciona: Pressure techniques and precise movements over the entire sole and instep of the foot.
Stimulate local blood and lymphatic circulation.
Their effects extend to legs, arms and neck, generating a general feeling of relaxation.
beneficios: Relieves tension in legs, arms and neck
tratamientos.idealPara: People who spend many hours on their feet, athletes or those with swollen feet.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Perform regularly to keep circulation active. Combine with hydration and stretching.

tratamientos.descripcion: A specialist massage to relieve tired, heavy or swollen legs. Stimulates circulation and lymphatic drainage.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For women with fluid retention, mild varicose veins, pregnant women or those with chronic heaviness.
comoFunciona: Rhythmic and precise movements over the entire leg, from ankle to hip.
Promote elimination of retained fluids and improve venous and lymphatic return.
Reduce the feeling of heaviness and swelling, leaving legs immediately lighter.
tratamientos.idealPara: Women with retention, pregnant women, people with chronic heaviness or those who sit for long hours.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Stay hydrated, walk and elevate legs after the massage to maintain results.

tratamientos.descripcion: Body wrap and massage with pure aloe vera to hydrate, soothe and regenerate skin. Ideal for sensitive, dry or sun-exposed skin.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For sensitised, dry skin, after intense sun exposure or with general tightness.
comoFunciona: A pure Aloe Vera wrap is applied to the whole body, harnessing its soothing and regenerating properties.
A massage follows to facilitate aloe absorption.
Improves circulation and restores the skin's natural balance.
beneficios: Restores skin's natural state after sun exposure
tratamientos.idealPara: Dry, irritated or sun-exposed skin.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Complement with sun protection and daily moisturising care.

tratamientos.descripcion: Professional massage with marine collagen serum. Ideal for mature or dehydrated skin, providing deep hydration and anti-ageing effect.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For mature or dehydrated skin wanting a rejuvenating manual effect, without needles or devices.
comoFunciona: The massage stimulates facial circulation and drainage, awakening microcirculation.
Marine collagen penetrates the skin, helping to maintain firmness, smoothness and natural tone.
Promotes skin cell regeneration and visibly smooths wrinkles and expression lines.
beneficios: Promotes brighter and more youthful skin
tratamientos.idealPara: Mature, dehydrated skin or skin with expression lines.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Complement with a facial care routine and sun protection to prolong results.

tratamientos.descripcion: Massage with high-potency Vitamin C concentrate. Ideal for dull, tired or stressed skin. Provides antioxidants that combat free radicals.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For dull skin, smokers, those exposed to pollution or with uneven tone needing radiance.
comoFunciona: The massage stimulates facial blood and lymphatic circulation, awakening oxygenation.
The Vitamin C concentrate penetrates the skin providing antioxidants that combat free radicals.
Promotes cell regeneration and restores radiance and even tone.
beneficios: Smooths fine lines and skin fatigue
tratamientos.idealPara: Dull, tired or stressed skin, with uneven tone or pollution exposure.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Apply sun protection after treatment to maximise results and protect skin.

tratamientos.descripcion: Lash extensions placing an artificial lash on each natural lash, achieving a longer, more defined and natural effect.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those wanting to wake up with make-up on, save time each morning and enhance their look for longer.
comoFunciona: Individual application on each natural lash, one by one.
Respects your eye shape and desired style (classic, volume, foxy, wispy, Hawaiian).
The result is a more intense look with greater volume and length, maintaining an elegant and natural finish.
tratamientos.idealPara: Those wanting to enhance their look without daily make-up, with personalised style.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Touch-up every 15–20 days at 50% of the price. If longer between appointments, price may vary depending on condition.

precios.concepto: Mega Volume / Foxy Eyes / Wispy touch-up

tratamientos.descripcion: Semi-permanent make-up that enhances eyebrows, lips and eyes with natural, long-lasting results. Special pigments and advanced techniques.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those wanting to save time on daily make-up, define asymmetric brows or enhance lips and eyes for longer.
comoFunciona: A personalised prior design is created adapted to each face, ensuring a harmonious result.
Pigments are implanted in the skin using a safe and virtually painless technique.
For brows, hair-stroke or shading techniques can be used, depending on the desired style.
A review is included at 30 days to perfect the result.
beneficios: Visible results from the first session
Natural and long-lasting effect (over a year)
tratamientos.idealPara: Those wanting to save on make-up, define brows, lips or eyes with a long-lasting effect.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Follow aftercare instructions for correct healing and to prolong pigment duration.

tratamientos.nombre: IPL Intense Pulsed Light Hair Removal
tratamientos.descripcion: Intense Pulsed Light acting from the hair root, progressively weakening it. Safe, comfortable and long-lasting.
tratamientos.paraQuien: For those wanting to forget razors, wax and painful laser. Ideal for all body areas, all skin types.
comoFunciona: IPL technology emits light pulses that are absorbed by hair melanin.
This energy acts directly from the root, progressively weakening the hair follicle.
After several sessions, hair is drastically reduced and skin is left smooth, without irritation.
beneficios: Visible results from the first sessions
tratamientos.idealPara: Men and women seeking long-lasting hair removal on any area.
tratamientos.recomendaciones: Avoid sun before and after treatment. Respect the time between sessions for best results.

precios.concepto: Small areas (lip, chin, sideburns, areola, fingers, neck, hands, between brows, temples, ears, cheeks)
Medium areas (full face, underarms, groin, intergluteal line, forearms, pubis, shoulders)
Large areas (half leg, full intimate, arms, buttocks, abdomen, chest, back)
OFFER: underarms + half leg + full bikini
